rationale: This page is a full-page advertisement for Vision IAS coaching programs. It features a chart of past student achievements (AIR ranks from 2013 to 2024) and provides scheduling information for upcoming Foundation Courses in General Studies for the years 2026-2029 across various Indian cities. It contains no educational content suitable for question generation.
cleanedText:
VISION IAS: OUR ACHIEVEMENTS
Selection Highlights (2013-2024):
- 2013: 200+ selections, Gaurav Agrawal (AIR 1)
- 2015: 500+ selections, Tina Dabi (AIR 1)
- 2016: 600+ selections, Anmol Sher Singh Bedi (AIR 2)
- 2017: 8 in Top 10, Sachin Gupta (AIR 3)
- 2018: 9 in Top 10, Kanishak Kataria (AIR 1)
- 2019: 7 in Top 10, Jatin Kishore (AIR 2)
- 2020: 10 in Top 10, Shubham Kumar (AIR 1)
- 2021: 8 in Top 10, Ankita Agarwal (AIR 2)
- 2022: 39 in Top 50, Ishita Kishore (AIR 1)
- 2023: 79 in Top 100, Aditya Srivastava (AIR 1)
- 2024: 10 in Top 10, Shakti Dubey (AIR 1)
Foundation Course: GENERAL STUDIES PRELIMS cum MAINS (2027, 2028 & 2029)
Batch Start Dates:
- DELHI: 23 Jan (5 PM), 6 Feb (11 AM), 13 Feb (8 AM), 24 Feb (5 PM)
- GTB NAGAR: 3 Feb (8 PM)
- AHMEDABAD: 17 Jan
- BENGALURU: 19 Jan
- BHOPAL: 21 Jan
- HYDERABAD: 11 Feb
- JAIPUR: 10 Dec
- JODHPUR: 2 Dec
- LUCKNOW: 21 Jan
- PUNE: 27 Jan
फाउंडेशन कोर्स सामान्य अध्ययन 2026 (Foundation Course General Studies 2026):
- प्रारंभिक, मुख्य परीक्षा और निबंध के लिए महत्वपूर्ण सभी टॉपिक का विस्तृत कवरेज (Comprehensive coverage of all important topics for Prelims, Mains, and Essay).
- Batch Dates: DELHI (17 Feb, 12 Jan), JAIPUR (10 Dec), JODHPUR (2 Dec).
